expectations.text: States the module is architecturally clean / no onion violations
expectations.evidence: 'Verdict: Compliant. I found no onion-architecture violations across the four files.'

expectations.text: Does NOT invent a layering/dependency violation that isn't present (no false positives)
expectations.evidence: Every file marked Compliant; the only note (NotFoundError placement) is explicitly 'not a violation.'

expectations.text: Any suggestions are framed as optional nitpicks, not violations
expectations.evidence: 'Optional, non-blocking: the skill's canonical pattern lets the service raise NotFoundError ... the current placement is not a violation.'
